steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the dropdown under "Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot" to initiate creating or managing bots, apps, or web pages using the Microsoft Teams SDK.
Click the "Other Teams Capabilities" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" section.
Click the "Simple Bot" option within the dropdown menu labeled "Teams Capability" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder" field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the path "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
